raw.n: Knowledge Atlas Technology Joint Stock Company Limited

holdings.n: Knowledge Atlas Technology Joint Stock Company Limited

news.t: Asia stocks tank as Nancy Pelosi touches down in Taiwan

holdings.infoBox: KTEC is an equity ETF with a total of 31 individual holdings. The top holdings are NetEase stock at 9.57%, Tencent Holdings at 8.93%, Meituan at 8.41%, Xiaomi at 8.29%, and BYD Co Ltd Class H at 8.18%.

overview.description: The KraneShares Hang Seng TECH Index ETF (KTEC) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Hang Seng Tech index, a market-cap-weighted index of the 30 largest Chinese technology companies traded in Hong Kong. KTEC was launched on Jun 9, 2021 and is issued by KraneShares.

data.title: Asia stocks tank as Nancy Pelosi touches down in Taiwan
data.text: Stocks in Asia quaked at the news that House Speaker Nancy Pelosi was moving forward with a visit to Taiwan on Tuesday. Markets across mainland China nd Hong Kong fell.
